name: Topco Technologies Corp.
summary: Topco Technologies Corp. engages in the import and export of chemical material related commodities in Taiwan, Mainland China, and internationally. It offers silicone related products, including silicone fluid, defoaming and release agent, foam stabilizer, fiber treatment, paint additives, resin, coupling agent, oil, rubber, PSA, powder, and grease, as well as paper release agent, HTV, liquid injection molding system, RTV I, RTV II, sealant, MS-RTV, thermal pad and LED application material, and AF coating agent. The company also provides various adhesives, such as construction structural adhesives; EXELAST; surface treatment equipment; matsumoto microsphere; poreflon membrane; touch panel related materials; poly tetra fluoroethylene films; and other products. In addition, it offers environmental catalysts; micro-capsule foam materials; silicate and anti-static agents; cosmetic raw materials and finished products; gunze fluorine sleeves; UV curing glues; atmospheric plasma; VUV washing machines; and conductive polymers and thermal materials, as well as other trade products. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
